title: Watershed Ecological Compensation and Transboundary Water Governance: Impacts on Pollution Abatement and Green Economic Efficiency in the Xin’an River Basin, China
description: SpeakForWater Episode 1: Watershed Ecological Compensation and Transboundary Water Governance: Impacts on Pollution Abatement and Green Economic Efficiency in the Xin’an River Basin, China. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
